notes: Framework knowledge lives in official skills/docs (Next.js bundles its own in node_modules/next/dist/docs); the kit only pins your project choices
Using Supabase? npx skills add supabase/agent-skills --skill supabase --skill supabase-postgres-best-practices
Distinctive UI work? npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design
Want the full lazy-dev toolchain (audit/review commands)? install the ponytail plugin - base.md already ships the distilled ruleset
